backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a product catalog backend with CRUD operations for electronics/watches products and a password-only admin verification function using a hardcoded password.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Admin login page was updated to remove the username field and display a password-only hint, matching the backend's password-only verifyAdminPassword interface.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend components and pages.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based design token CSS variables for both light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Gadgets Gear React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that configures TanStack Router with all page routes (home, electronics, watches, product detail, cart, checkout, search, admin) and wraps everything in CartProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminDeleteConfi: Alert dialog component that confirms product deletion by showing the product name and invoking the deleteProduct mutation, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/AdminProductForm: Modal dialog form for creating or editing a product with fields for name, brand, category, description, price, stock, and image URL, including validation and pre-population for edit mode.
frontend/src/components/AdminProductTabl: Admin product management table that lists all products with name, brand, category, price, and stock columns, and provides Add, Edit, and Delete actions via modal dialogs.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, navigation links for Shop categories, store info, an Admin Panel link, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, a search form that routes to /search, and a cart icon with item count badge.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product card with image, brand badge, name, description, price, and an Add-to-Cart button; links to the product detail page.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for cart state (items, totals) with add, remove, update, and clear operations, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Returns a backend actor instance (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/clear functions and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching products (all, by category, by ID) and mutations for admin operations (verify password, add, update, delete products).
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), sets up Tailwind directives, defines a dark-theme CSS variable palette (gold accent, dark surfaces), and adds utility classes for gold gradient text, card hover effects, and glow shadows.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a Tailwind class merger (`cn`), a price formatter that converts cents to USD currency string (`formatPrice`), and a placeholder image URL generator based on product name (`getProductImageUrl`).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin page with a password-only login form that verifies credentials via a `useVerifyAdmin` mutation, persists the session in localStorage, and renders the AdminProductTable when authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantity controls and remove buttons, calculates subtotal/shipping/total, and provides a proceed-to-checkout action; shows an empty-state view when the cart is empty.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page with a multi-field form for shipping address and payment details, client-side validation, formatted card/expiry inputs, and on successful submission clears the cart and navigates to the confirmation page.
Order confirmation page that displays a success icon, a generated order number, a step-by-step order status tracker, and navigation links back to home or to continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero banner with CTA links, trust-badge strip, and a grid of up to four featured products loaded via `useAllProducts` with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Displays a single product's details (image, price, stock, description) fetched by ID, with quantity selector and add-to-cart functionality including brief visual feedback.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Renders a category-filtered product grid with client-side brand and price-range filtering, sort controls, and a responsive slide-out filter panel for mobile.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResults.tsx: Shows search results by filtering all products client-side against a query string parameter, displaying matching ProductCards or an empty-state with category browse links.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark-themed design system with custom gold and surface color palettes, Space Grotesk/Inter fonts, custom shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 7) for the Gadgets Gear e-commerce site, listing implemented features, known issues, and architectural notes.
